## Description / 描述
Brief description of what this PR changes.

简要描述这个PR改变了什么。

## Type of Change / 变更类型
- [ ] Bug fix / Bug修复
- [ ] New section/methodology addition / 新增章节/方法论
- [ ] Translation / 翻译
- [ ] Documentation improvement / 文档改进
- [ ] Other / 其他

## Checklist / 检查清单
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md / 我已阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] The changes maintain the core principles (human judges, AI executes) / 变更保持核心原则（人判断，AI执行）
- [ ] Examples are concrete and clear / 示例具体且清晰
- [ ] No tool-specific recommendations added / 未添加工具特定推荐
- [ ] Bilingual terms preserved where applicable / 适用处保留双语术语

## Additional Notes / 其他备注
Any other notes for reviewers.

给审阅者的任何其他备注。
